finding_results.notes: Replaced summary diagnosis with additional dead material, a visible loss-of-control beat at the water glass and folded pages, and concrete audience consequences including resumed service, side conversation, an audience member leaving, and applause already breaking back into table noise.
Replaced the chest-based somatic landing with an observational beat: Doug hears the repeated phrase come back dead and recognizes the failure through the sound of his own material.
Added a pressure-bearing pre-show dinner and audience-expectation sequence that strengthens the ordeal engine and brings the chapter to 5286 words while preserving the chapter heading contract.
The two hotel-room emotional turns now enter through different cues, one tactile and one auditory, while preserving the bedspread, bolted fixtures, desk, pizza, and dead-hotel texture.

pass_summaries.summary: Corrected salary continuity, expanded the pre-show and onstage ordeal into concrete scene action, removed the recurring chest construction, and lifted the chapter above the minimum word target with causally necessary pressure.
Removed the repeated hotel-scene 'Doug looked at ...' launch and replaced it with distinct sensory/action openings without flattening Doug's object-driven interiority.
